## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check app/` passes (backend)
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes (frontend)
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes (frontend)
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing
- [ ] No hardcoded hex colors in CSS (use Tailwind classes)
- [ ] User-facing strings use `$t()` i18n keys
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in code
